intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: I've been driving trucks for twenty-two years. Last night I saw something.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Mm-hmm. Go on.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Triangular shape, three lights. Silent. Paced my rig for two miles.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Two miles. Then what?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Accelerated and was gone. I've got dash cam footage.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could've been a drone. Military runs tests out there.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: I know aircraft, Vern. Twenty-two years. This was different.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Dash cam footage. That's what we need. Real evidence.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I knew you'd understand. My dispatcher didn't believe me.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Send that footage in. Appreciate the call.

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Uh, sure. I drive trucks. Twenty-two years. Saw something last night.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: What kind of something?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Triangle. Three lights. No sound. Followed me for two miles.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: And?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Shot off like nothing I've ever seen. Got it on dash cam.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Probably military. They test stuff out there all the time.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: I've seen military aircraft. This wasn't that.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Dash cam. Good. At least someone brings evidence.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I figured you'd want proof. Most people just laugh.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: We've got {callerName} on the line from {callerLocation}. What's on your mind tonight?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, I've been driving trucks for twenty-two years. Last night, I saw something I can't explain.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Alright, walk me through it. What exactly did you see?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Triangular craft, three amber lights at each point. Completely silent. It paced my rig for two miles.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Two miles is a long time. What happened next?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: It accelerated and was gone in maybe two seconds. I've got dash cam footage of the whole thing.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Could've been a drone. Military runs tests in that area.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Vern, I know aircraft. Twenty-two years on the road. This was something else entirely.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Dash cam footage. Now that's what I'm talking about. Real evidence.

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I knew you'd understand. My dispatcher thinks I'm crazy.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Send that footage to the station. Appreciate the call.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Will do, Vern. Keep up the good work.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: {callerName} from {callerLocation}, you're on the air. What've you got for us?

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, I've been a trucker for twenty-two years. Last night changed everything I thought I knew.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: I like the sound of that. Tell me everything.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Triangular craft. Three amber lights. Dead silent. It matched my speed for two full miles.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Two miles! That's intentional. That's not random.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Exactly what I thought. Then it shot off faster than anything I've ever seen. Got it all on dash cam.

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Now hold on - military runs black projects out there. Could be experimental.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Vern, I've seen every aircraft type there is. This broke physics.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: Dash cam footage! That's exactly what we need. Documentation!

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I knew you'd get it. Everyone else thinks I'm losing my mind.

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Send that footage in immediately. This could be huge.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Already uploading it. Thanks for believing me, Vern.

intro.speaker: Vern
intro.text: Folks, we've got {callerName} calling in from {callerLocation}! What've you got?!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern! Twenty-two years driving trucks and last night I finally SAW one!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Tell me! Tell me everything!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Triangle! Three lights! Silent as death! It FOLLOWED me for two miles, Vern!

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: Two miles! It was watching you! What happened?!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: GONE. Like a bullet. But I got it! I got it on dash cam!

Skeptical.speaker: Vern
Skeptical.text: Wait wait wait - could've been military. They test crazy stuff out there.

Skeptical.speaker: Caller
Skeptical.text: Vern, nothing human moves like that. Nothing.

Believing.speaker: Vern
Believing.text: DASH CAM! You got it on CAMERA! THIS is what I'm talking about folks!

Believing.speaker: Caller
Believing.text: I KNEW you'd believe me! Everyone else thinks I'm nuts!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: Send that footage NOW! This is incredible!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Sending it right now! Thanks Vern!
